# Table F.1c: Forgetting on Freeway Sequence
- **Source**: Table F.1c, Appendix F.2
- **Caption**: "Forgetting of the baseline and FT-1 methods in all of the considered task sequences."
- **Conditions**: F_i = p_i(i·Δ) - p_i(T); 7-mode Freeway sequence (ALE/Freeway-v5); PPO; Δ=1M timesteps per task; 10 seeds

| METHOD | TASK 0 | TASK 1 | TASK 2 | TASK 3 | TASK 4 | TASK 5 | TASK 6 | TASK 7 | AVG. |
|--------|--------|--------|--------|--------|--------|--------|--------|--------|------|
| BASELINE | 0.02±0.44 | 0.87±0.00 | 0.49±0.35 | 1.00±0.00 | 0.51±0.44 | 0.80±0.24 | 0.70±0.24 | 0.60±0.43 | 0.62±0.42 |
| FT-1 | 0.49±0.45 | 0.75±0.33 | 0.62±0.11 | 0.88±0.33 | 0.54±0.42 | 0.69±0.37 | 0.62±0.34 | 0.72±0.33 | 0.58±0.43 |
